Privacy policy

MADMASEL AUTOTRADE Kft. is committed to protecting your personal data. We process data to handle quote requests, communicate with you, and operate the website.

1. Data controller

MADMASEL AUTOTRADE Kft.
Tax number: 25562242-2-42
EU VAT: HU25562242
Founded: 2016
Phone: +36 30 491 59 09
Registered office: coming soon

2. Collected data

  • Contact details (name, email, phone number)
  • Website usage data (cookies, IP address, browser type)

3. Purpose of processing

  • Communication and customer support
  • Handling quote requests and process management
  • Compliance with legal obligations

4. Data storage

We store data in a secure environment and keep it only as long as necessary.

5. Your rights

  • Right to information
  • Right to rectification
  • Right to erasure
  • Right to data portability

For more information, please contact us by phone or email.
